case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS JOHNSON DORIS TROPET

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON DORIS TROPET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
